title: Bump doc_max_length beyond 512
description: ModelConfig.doc_max_length is hardcoded at 512 in src/embedder/mod.rs. LateOn-Code-edge supports up to 2048 document tokens (from model onnx_config.json). omendb is NOT the blocker — it stores whatever vectors the embedder produces. Large functions silently lose their second half. Bump to 1024 or 2048 (check model's actual max_position_embeddings). Requires index rebuild.
